channel.title: Memory Hierarchy on Pixel Bytes
channel.description: Recent content in Memory Hierarchy on Pixel Bytes

item.title: CUDA Memory Hierarchy: Part 1 Basic Architecture, Cache Associativity and Register Files
item.description:
Introduction

When people first learn CUDA memory hierarchy, they usually see a pyramid: registers → shared memory / L1 → L2 → HBM/DRAM. That picture is useful, but it hides the real question:
